title: Squishy Super Stretchy Banana, Stress Relief and Fidget Squeeze Toy for Kids and Adults with Autism Anxiety ASD ADHD SPD Special Needs Sensory Hand Therapy, Great for Finger and Wrist Arthritis Physio
features: 🍌🎁🌴🌈 FUN NOVELTY SQUISHY BANANA - There's lots of monkey business to be had with this hilarious squeezy banana. Bananas are filled with sticky powder and measuring 15cm/6" long this fun novelty toy is a great party bag filler, funny gift, or even a good stress reliever. Slightly fragranced and smells divine!

🍌🎁🌴🌈 STRESS, ANXIETY, AUTISM, FANCY DRESS - These comedy bananas are also great to use as props for fancy dress or amateur dramatics. Also excellent as sensory toys for kids & adults. Its a squishy stress ball which will not leak or burst as it is NOT filled with liquid or gel. Filled with safe sticky powder. NOTE: It will rip if stretched too far! Safe to gently stretch up to 51cm/20"

🍌🎁🌴🌈 REALISTIC FIDGET STRESS BANANA - The Banana can live in your fruit bowl!. This realistic Banana is super stretchy and is ideal for playing pranks on your friends and family. Have hours of novelty fun pranking your friends with this hilarious stretchy Banana
🍌🎁🌴🌈 GREAT STRESS RELIEF TOY - Banana is a great source of sensory stimulation. Helps improve focus, concentration, and coordination

🍌🎁🌴🌈 IDEAL SENSORY & THERAPY TOY - This squidgy banana has a delightfully soft and very tactile feeling to it, making it irresistible to hold. Size Approx 15 x 3.5 cm (6" x 1.4") Fully safety tested and CE approved. Not suitable for under 3's
description: There's lots of monkey business to be had with this hilarious squeezy banana. Made from a squishy yellow rubber and measuring 6 inches long this fun novelty toy is a great party bag filler, funny gift, or even a good stress reliever. It is super stretchy and soft and can be shaped in various forms. Great for novelty presents for adults great for fun toys for kids - everybody loves them. The Banana can live in your fruit bowl! Slightly fragranced and smells divine!
